notes: Central file connecting division-polynomial coordinates to the group-law via the Jacobian-affine equivalence (zsmul_eq_smulEval); the main proof zsmul_genericPoint_eq and its generalization zsmul_affine_point_eq share nearly identical 60-90 line Jacobian roundtrip arguments that are strong refactoring candidates. Several witness-parametric theorems (zsmul_genericPoint_neg_of_pos, zsmul_genericPoint_add_one_of_witness, zsmul_genericPoint_two_of_witness) appear to be superseded scaffolding from before the Jacobian route was taken and are not called within the file.
